name: ComponentCard
source_code:
// src/components/ComponentCard.astro --- import type { CollectionEntry } from 'astro:content' import { ArrowRight } from '@lucide/astro' interface Props { component: | CollectionEntry<'application'>['data'] | CollectionEntry<'marketing'>['data'] | CollectionEntry<'neobrutalism'>['data'] } const { component } = Astro.props const { category, components, slug, title, updated } = component const componentCount = components.length + components.filter(({ dark }) => !!dark).length const recentUpdateThresholdDate = new Date() recentUpdateThresholdDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0) recentUpdateThresholdDate.setDate(recentUpdateThresholdDate.getDate() - 30) const isRecentlyUpdated = updated?.date ? new Date(updated.date) >= recentUpdateThresholdDate : false ---
